name: throupletea-app
description: UX7.9.6 smart native Episode Detail formatting and polish.

scripts.ios: npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.test:build-scripts: bash -n BUILD_SUPERMAN_AND_OPEN_XCODE.command && node --check scripts/prepare-bundled-catalog.js && node --check scripts/verify-bundled-catalog.js && node --check scripts/verify-rich-descriptions.js && python3 -m py_compile scripts/hydrate-episode-descriptions.py scripts/hydrate-episode-pages.py scripts/update-live-data.py scripts/configure-shareplay-ios.py
scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:formatter && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:ux796 && npm run test:build-scripts
